productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Black White Stripe Shirt
description: CompositionFull sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, with black and white stripes, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest, full length buttoned placket with black buttons and a snap button at the end, buttoned cuffs and snap button on the elbow area and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this black and white striped shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
